subject: math
activity_templates: A Pre-K counting-to-10 worksheet. Five rows, each showing a group of 1-10 cute cartoon objects, with a circle next to each row for the child to write the total count. Numbers 1-10 printed across the top as a reference strip. {{character}} waves at the top.

A trace-and-count worksheet for Pre-K. Numbers 1-10 in large dotted outlines for tracing, with small cute cartoon objects next to each number showing the quantity. {{character}} traces number 1 with a crayon.

A match-the-number worksheet. On the left, five groups of cute cartoon objects (2 apples, 5 stars, etc.). On the right, numbers 1-10. Child draws lines matching quantity to number. {{character}} cheers in the center.

A count-and-color Pre-K worksheet. A friendly cartoon scene with 1 cloud, 2 birds, 3 flowers, etc., up to 5. The child counts each group and colors the matching number below. {{character}} is the star of the scene.
